n: C27:scanned 2023-2025 post-2023 bugs (113+71+30=214 issues). No new fixed/windows-only candidates found. Notable confirmed-still-open: #12303(AddBackticksToIdentifierIfNeeded/not), #14566(query CE FS1182), #15419(task CE failwith), #15627(async before EntryPoint), #16856(single-case AP in let), #18001(allows ref struct type ext), #18003(LangVersion 8+SDK10 FS0229), #18344(SRTP backwards compat FSharpPlus)
